meta.title: CastMate - All-in-one platform for your castings
meta.description: Simplify your castings with CastMate. An all-in-one platform to manage applications, auditions, and talent selection.

hero.title: Manage your castings on a single platform
hero.description: CastMate brings all your tools together in one platform, designed to simplify the coordination of your castings.

steps.title: Create your casting<br class="framer-text">in just a few minutes
steps.subtitle: Configure your project, customize your forms, and generate a ready-to-share application site.

items.title: Create your casting campaign
items.text: Configure your project, customize your forms, and automatically generate a ready-to-share application site in just a few minutes.

items.title: Attract the right profiles
items.text: Connect your Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns to automatically funnel applications into a single platform.

items.title: Centralize all your applications
items.text: Each application is structured, browsable, and shared in real time to simplify profile tracking and decision-making.

items.title: Select and schedule your auditions
items.text: Filter applications, build your shortlists, and organize interviews directly from CastMate.

items.title: Automate candidate communications
items.text: Invitations, confirmations, reminders, or follow-up emails: your messages are sent automatically at every stage of the casting.

items.title: Run your castings as a team
items.text: Share information, coordinate your teams, and track casting progress on a centralized platform.

features.title: Built for casting<br class="framer-text">teams
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed to streamline casting organization on a daily basis.

items.title: Casting calendar
items.text: Schedule your auditions, view availability, and track the progress of your sessions in real time.

items.title: Centralized applications
items.text: Access all profiles, media, conversations, and evaluations from one single platform.

items.title: Task automation
items.text: Automatically send your invitations, reminders, and follow-up emails at every stage of the casting.

items.title: Custom forms
items.text: Adapt your questionnaires and selection criteria to the needs of each production.

security.title: Security and privacy<br class="framer-text">at the heart of CastMate
security.intro: European hosting, data protection, and infrastructure that meets the highest security standards.

cards.title: European hosting
cards.text: Your casting data and media are hosted in Europe on infrastructures compliant with security standards and GDPR.

cards.title: Secure platform
cards.text: CastMate protects access, communications, and casting data through a secure infrastructure aligned with current standards.

clarity.title: Manage with<br class="framer-text">greater clarity
clarity.intro: Access essential information in real time to track your castings and make decisions faster.

blocks.title: Track your castings<br class="framer-text">in real time
blocks.text: Visualize the progress of applications, auditions, and selections from a centralized dashboard.

blocks.title: Make decisions<br class="framer-text">faster
blocks.text: Compare profiles, share evaluations, and more easily identify the candidates best suited to your production.

blocks.title: Work with peace of mind
blocks.text: All information, conversations, and applications are centralized on a single platform.

teamCta.title: One platform to work as a team
teamCta.text: Applications, conversations, evaluations, and decisions: your entire team moves forward on a single platform built for audiovisual castings.

testimonials.title: Professionals share their experience
testimonials.intro: Discover how CastMate simplifies the daily work of casting professionals and audiovisual productions.

items.heading: CastMate brings better visibility into castings and lets us manage scheduling with greater agility.
items.quote: Before and now, agenda management is night and day. We can quickly cancel or adjust slots based on the number of registrations.
items.author: Clément

items.heading: CastMate centralizes all information and simplifies day-to-day tasks.
items.quote: Before, I had tons of tabs open just to complete a single task — now everything's in one tool. It's super practical to access an applicant's entire file in one place — their general knowledge test, their dossier — especially during interviews.
items.author: Benjamin

faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CastMate, how it works, and managing your castings.

items.question: What is CastMate?
items.answer: CastMate is an all-in-one platform designed to centralize and simplify the management of audiovisual castings, from application to final selection.

items.question: Who is CastMate for?
items.answer: CastMate is built for production teams and casting directors who want to organize and optimize their castings.

items.question: Do I need technical skills to use CastMate?
items.answer: No, the platform is intuitive and designed for quick onboarding by teams.

items.question: Where is the data hosted?
items.answer: Data is hosted in Europe, in France and Germany, ensuring security and compliance with current standards.

items.question: Can multiple people work on the same casting?
items.answer: Yes. CastMate lets teams collaborate on a single platform with shared access to applications, evaluations, conversations, and schedules.

items.question: Does CastMate support remote auditions?
items.answer: Yes. CastMate integrates video-conferencing and audition-tracking features directly within the platform.

items.question: Can application forms be customized?
items.answer: Yes. Forms and questionnaires can be adapted to the needs of each production and each casting.

items.question: Does CastMate replace multiple tools?
items.answer: Yes. CastMate centralizes applications, communications, auditions, schedules, and casting tracking on a single platform.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for your castings.
